data.body:
## Description

TDD RED phase — add a test_no_v2_md_fixture_writes assertion to test-v2-clean-guard.sh (from T1). This test greps tests/scripts/ for patterns that write .tickets/*.md frontmatter fixtures (e.g., 'printf.*id:.*> "$.*/.tickets/' or 'echo.*status:.*> .*/\.tickets/'). Assert output is empty.

Also add test_no_v2_tickets_dir_md_writes: grep tests/ for TICKETS_DIR fixture writes that create .md files under .tickets/.

Both tests FAIL RED against current codebase where test-sprint-next-batch.sh and others write .tickets/*.md fixtures.

## Files to edit
- tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh (add new test functions)

## TDD Requirement
Run test-v2-clean-guard.sh after adding these tests, confirm they FAIL RED. Do NOT change sprint/classify tests yet (that is T5).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test_no_v2_md_fixture_writes exists in test-v2-clean-guard.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_no_v2_md_fixture_writes' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh
- [ ] Test currently FAILS (RED) — confirms fixtures still exist
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-v2-clean-guard.sh 2>&1 | grep 'test_no_v2_md_fixture_writes.*FAIL'
